anomalies.title: Front door left open
anomalies.message: Front door has been open for 12 minutes.

actions.title: Resolve schedule collision
actions.summary: Nikolaj cannot cleanly do both School pickup and Customer call.
reasons: 20 minutes of timing slack are missing.
actions.whyNow: This conflict is already visible and will not fix itself later.
actions.consequenceIfIgnored: One of the commitments will become rushed, late, or dropped.

actions.title: Protect Nikolaj's leave-by window
actions.summary: School pickup needs movement soon or the day starts slipping.
reasons: Once this window is missed, downstream timing gets worse fast.
actions.whyNow: Travel and preparation time have already started to matter.
actions.consequenceIfIgnored: The event risks turning into a rushed or late arrival.

actions.title: Empty dishwasher
actions.summary: Nikolaj owns an overdue task that is already dragging into the day.
reasons: It is easier to clear now than later.
actions.whyNow: This is already late, so waiting does not improve anything.
actions.consequenceIfIgnored: It keeps stealing attention and makes the later schedule messier.

text:
Top 3 today
1. Resolve schedule collision — This conflict is already visible and will not fix itself later.
2. Protect Nikolaj's leave-by window — Travel and preparation time have already started to matter.
3. Empty dishwasher — This is already late, so waiting does not improve anything.

- Protect Nikolaj's leave-by window
- Empty dishwasher
